quoteFirst: Submarines were sighted by the cruiser _Minotaur_ at 1.23 P.M., and by the light cruiser _Boadicea_ at
quoteLast: ; both these ships were in the vicinity of the Battle Fleet which was manœuvred as necessary to avoid the submarines; this caused some slight delay in the southward movement.
title: The Grand Fleet, 1914-1916
author: Jellicoe, John Rushworth, 1859-1935

quoteLast: : sense of chilliness; the patient covers himself.
title: Dr. B. Mure's materia medica

quoteLast: Wednesday morning, central time, when everyone was asleep, and his train was due at Spartanburg at six-twenty that evening, eastern time. As a matter of fact--what time did your train get there?”
title: The nameless man
author: Lincoln, Natalie Sumner, 1881-1935; Ballinger, Harry Russell, 1892-1993 [Illustrator]

quoteFirst: The periods recur at varying lengths of time; in one instance a period began at
quoteLast: and was repeated at 2.06, 2.34, 2.55, 3.15, and at 3.36, when the observation ceased; in another instance a period began at 2.43 P.M., and was repeated at 2.57 and at intervals of from ten to fifteen minutes thereafter while the animal was being watched.
title: The A.B.-Z. of our own nutrition
author: Fletcher, Horace, 1849-1919; Higgins, Hubert [Contributor]; Someren, Ernest van [Contributor]
